title: Policy: Policy Applied - Settings Locked
scenario: Verify that policy-applied settings are locked (greyed out) in the mobile app, show a lock dialog on tap, and update correctly when the policy changes.
steps: Apply a policy on the Lens Cloud tenant.
Open the mobile app and navigate to the settings affected by the policy.
Verify that the affected settings are properly applied and locked (greyed out).
Tap on a locked setting and confirm that a dialog appears informing the user it is locked.
Update the policy with new values for the affected settings.
In the mobile app, verify that the setting values have been updated to match the new policy.
Confirm that the settings remain locked (greyed out) after the update.
Apply a policy that affects all available settings.
Verify that all settings in the mobile app are locked and greyed out.
expected: All settings affected by the policy are applied and locked (greyed out) in the mobile app. Tapping a locked setting shows a dialog informing the user it is locked. Updating the policy updates the values while keeping settings locked. A policy affecting all available settings locks all of them.
